creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Could you share the output of "uname -a" ?

I'm not able to reproduce it on my 13-RELEASE host:

hostname!root:~ # service dendrite status
dendrite is running as pid 62890.
hostname!root:~ # service dendrite restart
Stopping dendrite.
Waiting for PIDS: 62890.
Starting dendrite.
hostname!root:~ # service dendrite status
dendrite is running as pid 31.
hostname!root:~ # ps aux |fgrep dendrite
dendrite    31  38.3  0.3 1085548 190840  -  S    11:50         0:03.65 /usr/local/dendrite/bin/dendrite-monolith-server -config /usr/local/etc/dendrite/dendrite.yaml (dendrite-monolith-s)
postgres  7618   1.3  0.1  180492  37312  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.03 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(23537)  (postgres)
postgres 77698   1.1  0.1  180492  37356  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.04 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(62258)  (postgres)
postgres 52283   0.9  0.1  180492  38672  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.33 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(49339)  (postgres)
postgres  8990   0.8  0.2  183564 124536  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.43 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(62292)  (postgres)
postgres 44961   0.3  0.1  180492  43592  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.09 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(48561)  (postgres)
postgres  2005   0.0  0.1  180492  34616  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.02 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(24475)  (postgres)
postgres 46696   0.0  0.0  177932  32288  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.01 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(44764)  (postgres)
postgres 46855   0.0  0.0  177932  31252  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.01 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(45533)  (postgres)
postgres 58498   0.0  0.0  177932  31196  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.01 postgres: dendrite dendrite 127.0.0.1(8588)  (postgres)
root     98422   0.0  0.0   12876   2492  -  Ss   11:50         0:00.00 daemon: /usr/local/dendrite/bin/dendrite-monolith-server[31] (daemon)
root     47854   0.0  0.0   12948   2676  0  S+   11:51         0:00.00 fgrep dendrite
hostname!root:~ # rc_debug=YES service dendrite status
/usr/sbin/service: DEBUG: Sourcing /etc/defaults/rc.conf
dendrite is running as pid 31.
hostname!root:~ # rc_debug=YES service dendrite stop
/usr/sbin/service: DEBUG: Sourcing /etc/defaults/rc.conf
Stopping dendrite.
Waiting for PIDS: 31, 31.
hostname!root:~ # rc_debug=YES service dendrite start
/usr/sbin/service: DEBUG: Sourcing /etc/defaults/rc.conf
Starting dendrite.
hostname!root:~ # rc_debug=YES service dendrite status
/usr/sbin/service: DEBUG: Sourcing /etc/defaults/rc.conf
dendrite is running as pid 57543.

Thanks!
